caption: A man is seated in a podcast studio, wearing a black t-shirt with the word "CHECK" on it, a dark blue baseball cap with a gold emblem, and a gold chain. He wears a silver headset over his ears and speaks into a professional microphone positioned directly in front of him. Behind him is a white wall featuring gold stars and the repeated text "HUSTLE". In the background, a partial view of a blue screen and the text "BOSS TALK 101" are visible. On-screen overlays include a logo that says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" in both the left and right corners of the frame. As the scene progresses, the man remains in the same position, speaking and gesturing with his hands to emphasize his points, while his facial expressions shift slightly as he talks.
